title: Assessment of team members in sprints

posts.author: ffs_ffs (Fabio Silva)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello!

I do really your help!

Currently, I manage 10 scrum teams with 8 students each on a Pro plan. I use the “scream teams” from Monday Dev.

“Teams” have been created in Users and then allocated to each “Scrum Team”, which consists of 5 boards (Tasks, Sprint, Epics, Retrospective, and Bugs Queue).

Requirement:

Each student is evaluated 3 times in each sprint, where they receive a grade during the following meetings: m1-planning, m2-weekly-review, and m3-review.
I want to evaluate each student based on their progress in each Sprint. How can I have a board (or dashboard) where I can, for example, select the Team, the Sprint, and it lists all members for evaluation on that specific sprint?

Thank you so much!

posts.author: MikeB_Axanexa (Mike Buckiewicz)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi There!

This would be easier to show you than to type however the requirements of this would be two boards:

  • Sprint Tracking Board
  • Scrum Board

This enables you to track the sprints that the tasks were assigned and completed in plus be able to see how many story points were completed in a given sprint.

If this is too complicated, as long as you have standardized the timelines and durations to your sprint durations, you can use a dashboard easily to get this type of SLA information and filter down to what you are looking for.

I am a CSM and monday expert. Building these kinds of agile transformations is my specialty so if you want to take me up o na free consult please reach out and we can talk about how to enable the best results for you!

Mike B
Automation Architect
AXANEXA
